INSOMNEA art

Illustrations

UB5 Round 1 - Celestial Insomniac vs. The Murl

In early 2026 I participated in the 100 artist knockout competition "Unreal Björnament" by Björn Hurri. It's a 1v1 battle with one prompt and two weeks to submit an artwork, either illustration or concept art. The prompt for the first round was "The magical item granted otherworldly powers". The competition runs for multiple rounds, whereas only one winner per pair will participate in the next round.

Twitch Layout

In 2026 I designed a Twitch overlay for the Streamer Always__Noob. I created an overlay for a starting as well as just chatting screen and some info panels. Most of it was made with Krita, the animations were made with Adobe After Effects. There will be another overlay for a different type of content for this streamer in the future.

Figure drawing
